text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... It seems that I am visited by a fairy of slumber.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My rendezvous with the full moon lasted
the whole night through.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Its wondrous white glow filtered into my room.
Entranced, I opened my window, and then I
sensed it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I felt the loneliness and longing of one who can
only visit me once in a month!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For that pitiful moon, I recited the heroic tales of
the Overlord until dawn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end the meeting early so Opera O can get some
rest.
